howItWorks.intro: This gold spot price calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Gold Value = Weight in Troy Oz × Spot Price
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is the current gold spot price?
faq.answer: This calculator defaults to approximately $2,350/oz. Enter the current spot price for accurate results. Gold prices change throughout the trading day.

faq.question: What is a troy ounce?
faq.answer: A troy ounce equals 31.1035 grams, heavier than a standard (avoirdupois) ounce of 28.35 grams. All precious metals are measured in troy ounces.

howWeCalculate.intro: This gold spot price calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
